message:
perf(mvcc,e2e,tests): zero-copy page cell parsing, executor partition refactor, callsite profiling wiring, test fixes

MVCC physical merge zero-copy:
- Refactor ParsedCell and ParsedPage to borrow cell bytes (&'a [u8])
  instead of cloning to Vec<u8>, eliminating one allocation per cell
  during the structured page merge path
- Thread lifetime annotations through all parse functions
  (parse_btree_page, extract_cell_with_digest, parse_leaf_table_cell,
  parse_leaf_index_cell, parse_interior_table_cell,
  parse_interior_index_cell, diff_parsed_pages)
- Add #[inline(never)] to resolve_with_trace for flamegraph visibility

E2E improvements:
- Refactor partition_records to hoist each worker's pre-transaction SQL
  prefix independently rather than using a global index, supporting
  workloads where workers have distinct setup SQL sequences
- Wire callsite breakdown (parse_record / parse_record_into /
  parse_record_column per scope) into the hot-path profile report
- Fix operation baseline probes: reset hot-path profile before
  measurement window and snapshot counters before validation queries

Test fixes:
- Replace single-element for-in loops with block scope in conformance
  oracle tests for cleaner Clippy-friendly control flow
- Minor VFS fault injection and crash recovery test adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -718,6 +736,45 @@ fn parser_profile(snapshot: ParserHotPathProfileSnapshot) -> HotPathParserProfil
     }
 }
 
+#[must_use]
+fn record_decode_callsite_counters(
+    parse_record_calls: u64,
+    parse_record_into_calls: u64,
+    parse_record_column_calls: u64,
+) -> HotPathRecordDecodeCallsiteCounters {
+    HotPathRecordDecodeCallsiteCounters {
+        parse_record_calls,
+        parse_record_into_calls,
+        parse_record_column_calls,
+    }
+}
+
+#[must_use]
+fn hottest_full_record_decode_callsite(
+    breakdown: &HotPathRecordDecodeCallsiteBreakdown,
+) -> Option<(&'static str, u64)> {
+    [
+        ("btree_cursor", breakdown.btree_cursor.parse_record_calls),
+        ("vdbe_engine", breakdown.vdbe_engine.parse_record_calls),
+        (
+            "core_connection",
+            breakdown.core_connection.parse_record_calls,
+        ),
+        (
+            "core_compat_persist",
+            breakdown.core_compat_persist.parse_record_calls,
+        ),
+        (
+            "vdbe_vectorized_scan",
+            breakdown.vdbe_vectorized_scan.parse_record_calls,
+        ),
+        ("unattributed", breakdown.unattributed.parse_record_calls),
+    ]
+    .into_iter()
+    .max_by(|lhs, rhs| lhs.1.cmp(&rhs.1).then_with(|| lhs.0.cmp(rhs.0)))
+    .filter(|(_, total)| *total > 0)
+}
+
 #[must_use]

     fixture_id: &str,
